suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on cross-feature integration testing patterns
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of cross-feature-integration feature found that AGENTS.md lacks specific guidance on how to verify cross-feature integration. The test script provides a reasonable pattern but there's no documented standard for this type of testing.
